entities.name: Incantum Engine
entities.context: Natural language dispatcher used in the system

entities.name: Command Registry
entities.context: Contains lookup tables for commands and triggers

entities.name: Function Files
entities.context: Contains orchestration prompts for the system

entities.name: Scripts Layer
entities.context: Executable code layer defining atomic behaviors

entities.name: n5_safety.py
entities.context: Critical single point of failure, used by all scripts

entities.name: Data Layer
entities.context: Includes Knowledge Store and Lists Store

entities.name: Runtime Infrastructure
entities.context: System components for logs, backups, and audit trails

relationships.context: V uses the Incantum engine for command dispatch
V utilizes the Command Registry for command lookups
V employs Function Files for orchestration
V utilizes the Scripts Layer for executing code
V's system uses n5_safety.py for safety measures
V believes in the importance of validation schemas
V uses the Data Layer for storing knowledge and lists
V relies on Runtime Infrastructure for operational logging and backups
V has plans to implement the Breadcrumb System
